docs.title: ☕ Java Resources
docs.text:
• Learn.java - Official Java learning platform for beginners, students, and teachers featuring tutorials, interactive exercises, projects, and a Java Playground

  • Inside Java - Official Oracle Java team portal providing Java news, OpenJDK updates, JVM insights, podcasts, technical articles, and information about upcoming Java features

docs.title: 🟣 Kotlin Resources
docs.text: • Kotlin - Official Kotlin website with documentation, tutorials, playgrounds, language references, and guides for Android, backend, AI, and multiplatform development. Kotlin is a modern JVM language designed to work seamlessly with Java.
